race.description: Barmah Park Restaurant & Cellar Door Hcp (Bm66)
race.comment: IMPONDERABLE (14) gave a sight second-up and was just nabbed late when runner-up over a mile at Seymour. Fitter for two runs back and worth noting last time third up, also at the mile, found winning form. Looks ready to win and appeals as a leading prospect. THE DEVIL IN HER (7) had a year off before returning with an eye-catching fourth last time, beaten just a long neck in a four way drive to the line at Caulfield Heath. Yet to fire second-up but will go close this line-up if repeats that fresh rating. Can only be fitter and will be hard to hold out here. PRINCING (8) was fourth fresh then improved to finish runner-up latest. Is a third-up winner and should be in the finish again.  CALYPSO KING (11) is ready to win.
